/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libbwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/bwi_perception_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/bwi_perception_interface/msg/detail/dl_amcl_coords__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
